title: Landing page shows primary Sign In CTA
description: Verify the marketing page loads for signed-out users and exposes the primary Sign In action in the header.

steps.description: Verify element "Go to Dashboard" is visible

title: Landing page Sign In CTA navigates to Clerk sign-in
description: Verify the header Sign In CTA takes a signed-out user to the Clerk sign-in page.

steps.description: Verify Clerk sign-in UI is visible

title: Direct sign-in route renders Clerk UI
description: Verify a signed-out user can open the dedicated /sign-in route and see the Clerk sign-in screen.

steps.description: Verify Clerk sign-in UI is visible

title: Direct sign-up route renders Clerk UI
description: Verify a signed-out user can open the dedicated /sign-up route and see the Clerk sign-up screen.

steps.description: Verify Clerk sign-up UI is visible

title: Protected dashboard redirects signed-out users to sign-in
description: Verify visiting /dashboard while signed out redirects to Clerk sign-in.

steps.description: Verify Clerk sign-in UI is visible

title: Components page lists all installable widgets
description: Verify the /components page loads and shows the three widget sections with installation blocks.

title: Widgets playground renders core sections
description: Verify the widgets playground page loads for public users and shows the core widget sections and controls.

title: Widgets playground exposes mock controls
description: Verify the widgets playground exposes mock mode controls needed for local UI testing.

title: Clerk two-step sign-in reaches dashboard
description: Verify sign-in uses the correct two-step Clerk flow: email then Continue, password then Continue, then redirect to /dashboard.

steps.description: Enter "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field and click "Continue"
Verify the password field becomes visible after clicking Continue
Enter "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field and click "Continue"

title: Signed-in dashboard shows projects and create form
description: Verify the dashboard renders the projects view, the new project form, and the projects list area after successful sign-in.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Verify element "Project name" input is visible

title: Create project inline form works
description: Verify a signed-in user can create a project from the inline dashboard form and gets navigated to the project detail page.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Type "TestSprite Project" into the "Project name" input

title: Empty project name cannot be submitted
description: Verify the dashboard create button stays disabled or prevents submission when the project name is empty.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Verify the "Create" button is disabled when the "Project name" input is empty

title: Project detail page shows analytics controls
description: Verify a signed-in user can open a project detail page and see the analytics controls, publishable key section, and overview tab.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Open the first available project from the dashboard list, or create a project first if none exist

title: Project detail page links to widgets testing
description: Verify the project detail page exposes the "Test in Widgets" link so a signed-in user can jump into the widgets playground.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Open the first available project from the dashboard list, or create a project first if none exist
Verify text "Test in Widgets" is visible

title: Components page shows installation and usage blocks for widgets
description: Verify the components page exposes installation and usage sections for the widget registry entries.

title: Widgets page shows signed-out helper text
description: Verify the widgets playground shows the signed-out helper copy for project key autofill when the user is not authenticated.

steps.description: Verify text "Sign in and open this page again to pick a project and auto-fill the publishable key." is visible

title: Project detail shows publishable key controls
description: Verify the project detail page exposes the publishable key section with Reveal, Copy, and Rotate key controls.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Open the first available project from the dashboard list, or create a project first if none exist

title: Project detail shows allowed origins editor
description: Verify the project detail page shows the Allowed origins section and save action for origin restrictions.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Open the first available project from the dashboard list, or create a project first if none exist
Verify text "open" or text "restricted" is visible

title: Project detail filter controls expose range and widget options
description: Verify the project detail page exposes the analytics range selector and widget filter selector with expected options.

steps.description: Complete Clerk sign-in using the two-step flow with "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Open the first available project from the dashboard list, or create a project first if none exist
Open the date range selector on the project detail page
Open the widget filter selector on the project detail page
